Md Iftekhar Khan

DevOps Engineer  ·  Cloud Infrastructure  ·  Automation

12+ years of hands-on experience in Cloud, Automation, and Security. Strong expertise in Microsoft Azure, Docker, Kubernetes (AKS), Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, and Linux systems — building infrastructure that scales.

Technical Arsenal

Core Skills

🟠
AWS Cloud
EC2, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, Lambda, CloudWatch — scalable cloud infrastructure and managed services on Amazon Web Services
🔵
Azure Cloud
VMs, VNets, Storage, Load Balancers, Application Gateway, AKS, SQL Database — full Azure infrastructure management
🐧
Linux
RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu — system administration, user management, permissions, patching, and performance monitoring
🐙
GitHub & GitHub Actions
Source code management, branch strategies, pull requests, and automated CI/CD workflows via GitHub Actions pipelines
🐳
Docker
Dockerfiles, Docker Compose, image building and optimization — 30% reduction in environment-related issues across dev & prod
☸️
Kubernetes
Pods, Deployments, Services, Ingress Controllers, HPA/VPA auto-scaling on AKS and self-managed clusters
🏗️
Terraform
Infrastructure as Code — automated provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle management of cloud resources at scale
🤖
Ansible
Configuration management, playbook automation, server provisioning, and application deployment across environments
📈
Grafana
Dashboard creation, data visualization, alerting, and real-time monitoring of infrastructure and application metrics
🔥
Prometheus
Metrics collection, alerting rules, service discovery, and time-series monitoring for containerized and cloud workloads
🔒
Networking & Security
VNets, Load Balancers, Sophos Firewall, VPN, Forcepoint DLP, NAT rules, and threat prevention
📧
Microsoft 365
Exchange Online, SharePoint, Teams, Azure AD, user & license management, mail flow, and security policies
Career Journey

Work Experience

Witzeal Technologies Pvt Ltd
Apr 2023 – Present
DevOps Engineer
DevOps Engineer with 12+ years of experience in Desktop, Server, Network, Cloud, Security, Backup, Endpoint Management, and Automation. Built and maintained Docker images, reducing environment-related issues by 30% and ensuring consistency across development and production environments.
AzureDockerKubernetesTerraformLinuxCI/CD
U2opia Mobile Pvt Ltd
Sep 2015 – Mar 2023
Senior Engineer
Senior Engineer with strong experience in server-level and end-user support. Proficient in Windows & Linux server administration, Active Directory, DNS/DHCP, Druva online backup, Sophos endpoint security and firewall administration. Experienced managing local IT infrastructure including switches, routers, Wi-Fi controllers, access points, and biometric systems.
Windows ServerActive DirectorySophosDNS/DHCPDruva
CCS Computers Pvt. Ltd
Sep 2012 – Sep 2015
System Engineer
System Engineer with hands-on expertise in desktop and server-level support. Strong in end-user troubleshooting, Windows OS, hardware/software support, Microsoft 365 administration, and ticketing systems. Skilled in monitoring, patch management, and ensuring stable, secure IT infrastructure.
IT SupportMicrosoft 365Patch ManagementNetworking
What I Do

Key Responsibilities

Designed, deployed, and managed cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure including VMs, VNets, Storage Accounts, Load Balancers, Application Gateway, and Azure SQL Database.
Administered Microsoft 365 services — Exchange Online, SharePoint, Teams, Azure AD, user/license management, mail flow, and security policies.
Built, optimized, and maintained Docker images using Dockerfiles and Docker Compose, ensuring consistency across dev, QA, and production environments.
Deployed and scaled containerized applications using Kubernetes and AKS with Ingress Controllers, auto-scaling (HPA/VPA), and full lifecycle management.
Installed, configured, and maintained Linux systems (RHEL, CentOS, Ubuntu) — user management, permissions, patching, performance monitoring, and troubleshooting.
Implemented Infrastructure as Code using Terraform to automate provisioning and lifecycle management of cloud resources at scale.
Managed Git repositories and implemented CI/CD pipelines to automate build, test, and deployment processes across environments.
Configured and managed Sophos Firewall — security policies, VPNs, NAT rules, captive portal traffic monitoring, and threat prevention.
Implemented Forcepoint DLP policies to prevent data leakage and ensure compliance with organizational security standards.
Managed Scalefusion MDM for device enrollment, policy enforcement, application management, and endpoint security.
Administered Druva Online Backup solutions, ensuring reliable data backup, recovery, and business continuity compliance.
Monitored system performance, security events, and infrastructure health — proactively identifying and resolving issues to maintain high availability.
